title: Borehole reinforcement & monitoring

title: Livestock-offtake subsidy activation

title: Rangeland rest rotation
description: Close two grazing blocks for 60 days under traditional authority enforcement.

title: Activate Inkhundla DRMC

title: Social-protection seasonal top-up
